setup_task.sh: standard_clauses.txt ARTICLE V and task logic (Sophie is minor)
task.json description sections 5-6: Heading 1 for ARTICLE headings, Heading 2 for section headings

privileged_info_summary: The task requires drafting a Last Will and Testament for Elias Thorne (fictional client). The document must include specific family information: spouse Clara Thorne, adult child Marcus Thorne (DOB 1990-06-15, age 36), and minor child Sophie Thorne (DOB 2014-11-02, age ~12 in 2026). Because Sophie is a minor, the Appointment of Guardian article is mandatory, naming Sarah and James Miller as guardians. Specific bequests include a 1978 Gibson Les Paul Custom guitar to David Thorne (brother) and a Rolex Submariner Date watch to Marcus Thorne (son). The document must use Heading 1 styles for ARTICLE headings and Heading 2 styles for section headings, include page numbers in footer, and be saved as Draft_Will_Thorne.odt.
